Robe of the Primordial Ritualist  
 

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: CHEST
AC: 11
STR: +2 WIS: +4 INT: +4 HP: +10
SV DISEASE: +5
WT: 2.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: CLR NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: HUM ERU HIE DEF GNM IKS FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: CHEST
AC: 11
STR: +2 WIS: +4 INT: +4 HP: +10
SV DISEASE: +5
WT: 2.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: CLR NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: HUM ERU HIE DEF GNM IKS FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Cryosilk Robe
Tint:

Stackable:No

Source:Live

Page Updated:Sat Sep 7th, 2019

Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 1

# Aug 19 2002 at 6:55 PM Rating: Decent

4 posts
Hi there,

Does this robe still drop in Befallen, or was it a part of the "changed" befallen that Lanys and her followers were inhabiting?

RE: Does this robe still drop?
QuoteReply
# Aug 20 2002 at 4:05 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592246015217
79 posts
According to the "Last Updated" entry, this is way before the temporarily modified Befallen. So Hopefully it is still in there. But I don't know. So the question still stands, does this drop still?
▲ Page top
Drops
QuoteReply
# Mar 20 2002 at 10:05 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591746810546
11 posts
I have camped this guy on and off for some time. Well on day I sat down and killed him every 40 mins or so. Repop seems to be between 30-40 minutes. The Ritualist hits for 50 max and nukes for something like a 150 but i cant remeber. I killed him a total of 8 times i think before i got one robe. I got one specter before that. Most of the time he drops nothing or a low level gem. At 53 i could camp in a certain part of the room and only aggro him or his ph and not the 2 ensalved followers in there. The followers have about 650 hp or so. The Rituals that is the ph has under 500 and the rare himself has over 2k hp and heals, plus can't be stuned. Hope this helps that are hoping.
Regent Vicar of Innoruuk, Zexsudel Epyon of Fennin Ro
▲ Page top
just asking
QuoteReply
# Mar 06 2002 at 4:20 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758953570
8 posts
I would like to know what lvl that creature is and if a 23 mage would be able to take hi with a grp? And how long i should camp it and if it still drops? Answers are appreciated! Thank you!
BTW I would love to see a Dwarf running around with a robe in Primary Slot trying to use it as a whip! Hehe kinda goofy ! Lol !


J/K

Nadalya Draagonslayer
( Norrathian Normads)
▲ Page top
Got one on RZ on 2/16/02 at 5:15 EST
QuoteReply
# Feb 19 2002 at 11:47 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591755305311
31 posts
I came in to check to see if the Primordial was spawning again and lucked up on 2nd spawn. He or his PH spawns every 35ish minutes, and after camping him bascially for the next 46 hours he spawned 8 more times and never dropped robe or sceptre. G'luck!

UPDATE: 2/21/02 Camped him again for MY sceptre and for a robe for my brother and friend. The three of us have dropped him at least 15 more times since the 16th and he has only dropped coin.

Edited, Thu Feb 21 17:01:31 2002
▲ Page top
Here's what I know
QuoteReply
# Sep 10 2001 at 4:12 PM Rating: Good
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
A couple months ago when Befallen first changed over to a higher level zone I went there to explore and see what new mobs and items I could find after collecting several pieces of Pristine Studded Leather armor I Stumbled into a room with a named Human Cleric " The Primordial Ritualist " standing guarded by a Troll and a Ogre all green to me at level 51 after killing them and looting nothing I desided to camp the named Cleric about 20 minutes later a place holder spawned " Servant of T'Vyl " dropped the same no rent robe as all the other Servant of T'Vyl drop , the place holder continued to spawn about ever 16 to 20 minutes sometimes 30 minutes this went on for about 6 hours then The Primordial Ritualist spawned again dropping no loot after about 15 straight hours and 4 Ritualist finally he dropped an item it was " Robe of The Primordial Ritualist " nice robe and no drop I liked that , knowing that most named mobs have a common and a rare I stayed to see what else he might drop after 30+ straight hours in this room only haveing the Ritualist spawn 10 times and nada for loot 9 out of those 10 times he spawned and had a Scepter of The Darkened Rite I spent 32 straight hours in Befallen on this spawn got him to spawn 11 times only dropped loot twice robe & scepter . next days a friend was camping it after I told him where it was and what it dropped for me he camped it for atleast 24 straight hours and no loot to drop at all I went to assist him and while I was in the zone a <SYSTEM MESSAGE> came across saying Befallen will be repopped in 10 minutes all the mobs disappeared and when the zone repopped it was the old Befallen the old mobs undead , rats and Necro's the zone stayed this way for a couple of weeks then it came back I went there several times but never saw The Primordial Ritualist again . As of yesterday 9/10/01 Befallen zone on the Prexus server is back to the way it was undead and Necro's no Guardian of T'Vyl or Servant of T'Vyl . Since I have obtained these items I have heard Cleric's talking about the Scepter but have heard no mention of the Robe do I have the only one on Prexus or just one of a small few ? Do to the time spent on this spawn and the only getting 2 out of 11 Ritualist to drop any loot I would have to say the Scepter is rare/common and the Robe would be very rare . The Robe is still and as I know always was ( SLOT: CHEST PRIMARY ) yes it can be equiped in the primary hand and held .

LOCATION: Befallen 3rd floor go down the well threw the hidden wall across the the hall there is a door go threw it into a small room from there straight across to a second door beyond that door is a large room with 2 Servant of T'Vyl in the center of that room and 3 Guardian of T'Vyl around the outside walls of the room from the large room there are 3 or 4 doors leading to smaller rooms one of these small rooms has a back room that is where The Primordial Ritualist spawns every small room has Servant's in them and or Ogre's , all was green to me at 51 but trained easy and tuff in groups had to gate a couple times . the room that spawns the Ritualist has a Ogre a Troll and place holder is Servant of T'Vyl with pet . The Primordial Ritualist will try to run before he dies so root him so he doesn't train because he can run away and heal . Hope Befallen changes back and this stuff still drops Good Luck to all who camp it.






Zylr D'Vine
51 Vicar of Innoruuk
LORDS OF HONOR~Prexus
▲ Page top

QuoteReply

Dwarven Robes
QuoteReply
# Jul 03 2001 at 12:52 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592247037290
37 posts
Think about this from a roleplaying standpoint - what self-respecting Dwarf, especially a Dwarven priest, would go charging into battle wearing... a dress?!
▲ Page top
Dorfs can't wear robes
QuoteReply
# Jul 18 2001 at 1:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591762535220
View User Forum
80 posts
They have no robe graphic.
If you've ever seen a chanter turn into any non-robe compatible class (Ogre, Troll, Halfelf, Woodelf, Dwarf, Halfling, Barn). it just ends up coloring the chest area (where a tunic would go) to the color of the robe. Hope this clears things up.

BTW Dorf isn't listed under compatable races for this item \=)
▲ Page top
RE: Dwarven Robes
QuoteReply
# Jul 03 2001 at 1:15 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757808233
21 posts
Yeah that is probably true but i like the extra wisdom it would give me and a black robe might look kinda cool on a dwarf I wonder what it would look like. I like the wisdom but i am not sure if i would replace my dusty bp with the robe even if i could have it in my chest slot. but it would be a intersting item for the primary slot. I jsut think its unfair that all the other cleric types can have it except for dwarfs.

Dwarf Clerics???? I wish i coul use
QuoteReply
# Jun 29 2001 at 3:33 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757808233
21 posts
I am a dwarf Cleric i think that this item would look really cool on a dwarf but it is not useable by one are there any robes in the game that dwarfs could use????? If a Gnomish Cleric can use it and a High elf cleric can why can't a dwarf cleric be able to???? Are dwarfs just to fat? If a gnome can shorten it to fit him then shouldn't a dwarf be able to make the adjustments or somthin to make it fit him????
▲ Page top
RE: Dwarf Clerics???? I wish i coul use
QuoteReply
# Jun 29 2001 at 3:43 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591756328561
2 posts
There are no robes wearable by dwarves b/c there is no INT caster class available to dwarves. Thus there is no graphic for a dwarf in a robe. =(

Flavius SoF
Cleric 54
RZ
